daily.today_energy: Your emotional intuition is *chef's kiss* today. The moon's vibes are amplifying your natural ability to read the room, so trust those gut feelings when something feels off or right.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's deepening an existing connection or attracting fresh energy, your authenticity is magnetic rn. Lean into it.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are hitting different today. This is peak energy for pitching ideas or tackling that project you've been nervous about. Your vibe matters more than perfection.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding—maybe a walk, stretching, or literally touching grass. Mental clarity follows when you're not stuck in your head. Move with intention today.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is absolutely glowing this week, bestie. The cosmos is whispering secrets that only you can hear. Trust those gut feelings and let your inner wisdom guide your decisions. Something's shifting beneath the surface, and it's honestly kind of magical.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Real conversations are where the magic happens. Single? Someone's been noticing your energy. Don't dim your light waiting for permission to shine. Your vibe is irresistible this week.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't play small with what you're creating. Someone influential is paying attention, even if you haven't noticed yet. Trust your instincts about which projects deserve your energy and which ones don't.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more gentleness and rest. This isn't laziness, it's alignment. Move in ways that feel good, not ways that feel obligatory. Your nervous system needs some extra love this week. Water, sleep, and soft moments are your medicine.
